arts.ttl: Germany U21 3-0 France U21: Early goals enough to send Germany to U21 Euros final
arts.sum: Germany U21 will face their counterpart from England in Saturday’s final after seeing off France thanks to two goals in the first 15 minutes.

arts.ttl: Confirmed Lineups: Germany U21 vs. France U21
arts.sum: The lineups are out as Germany and France go head-to-head for a place in the U21 Euros final.

arts.ttl: Predicted Germany U21 Line-up vs France U21: Can Nick Woltemade and Co. book their place in the final?
arts.sum: Germany will look to secure a place in the UEFA U21 European Championship final with a win over France on Wednesday night. Antonio Di Salvo is expected to name the…

arts.ttl: Germany U21 vs France U21 preview: Team news & predicted lineups – U21 Euros 2025
arts.sum: Germany will hope to reach their third final in the last four U21 Euros when they face France on Wednesday.
